articles.title: The Apple of haircare gets its German cheque
articles.description: Ruka, the London-based textured-hair company founded by Zimbabwean entrepreneur Varaidzo Tendai Moyo and her co-founder Ugorji Agbai, has closed a $4.5m round co-led by Henkel Ventures and Freedom Trail Capital. The deal, which takes lifetime funding to roughly $10m and brings one of the world's largest consumer-goods groups onto the cap table, is the most meaningful endorsement yet of a Zimbabwean diaspora-founded brand.

articles.title: Shumba Maasai in Venice
articles.description: At the 61st Biennale, the Zimbabwean artist's day-long procession through the city's campi, performed under the borrowed authority of a Murehwa chief, restages the social-sculpture lineage of Joseph Beuys for a contemporary African discursive practice.

articles.title: From Boreham Wood FC’s bus to the world of Mugabe, Yeltsin, Bush and Trump
articles.description: With the Wood one win from an EFL debut, a veteran correspondent recalls lessons learned from their amateur days

more.title: Delta Corporation, ZIMRA tax dispute hits US$97 million
more.description: Delta Corporation and its associate, African Distillers (Afdis), are facing cumulative tax assessments from the Zimbabwe Revenue Authority (ZIMRA) totalling approximately US$97 million, up from US$73 million last year. The US$24 million increase is largely linked to the 2021 tax year. The disagreement centres on ZIMRA’s retroactive application of apportionment methods, including a “turnover-ratio method,” [...] The post Delta Corporation, ZIMRA tax dispute hits US$97 million appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com .

more.title: South Africa applauds Zimbabwe’s Beitbridge Border upgrade plans
more.description: Channel Africa South Africa (SA) has commended Zimbabwe’s efforts to modernise the Beitbridge Border Post, describing plans to expand the crossing infrastructure as critical to improving regional trade and easing congestion at Africa’s busiest land border. The SA and Zimbabwe Bi-National Commission Mid-Term Review was co-chaired with Zimbabwe’s Permanent Secretary of the Department of Foreign [...] The post South Africa applauds Zimbabwe’s Beitbridge Border upgrade plans appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com .

more.title: Zimbabweans lured into Russia’s war as families plead for their return
more.description: Al Jazeera Elvis Sitshela remains deeply unsettled by the sudden departure of his brother, Dumisani, to Russia in early 2026. Dumisani left in complete secrecy, without telling the family, until a shocking text arrived from an international number. “Hi, brother, I am in Russia now. It’s me, Dumisani,” recalled Elvis, who requested his real name [...] The post Zimbabweans lured into Russia’s war as families plead for their return appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com .

more.description: MORE than 3,000 kilometres of road networks in Harare are in urgent need of rehabilitation, laying bare the dire straits of the infrastructure in the capital.
